info.title: Nabil Fuad Raiyan — Portfolio
info.summary: Machine-readable description of the public portfolio surface.
info.description: This portfolio is a static site and does not expose a write API. This description advertises the read-only, publicly cacheable content endpoints (HTML pages, their Markdown representations, and the structured index files) for AI agents and other automated clients.

get.description: Landing page. Send Accept: text/markdown or ?format=md to receive the Markdown representation.

200.description: The home page as HTML or Markdown.

get.description: Structured index of the site per the llmstxt.org convention.
